_description: CI coverage gap: gated integration tests use tedious/Testcontainers, NOT the sqlcmd transport; flag combos, chunking, encoding only surface on a real sqlcmd run

gapDescription.whatIsCovered: SQL validity via tedious wire protocol against Testcontainers SQL Server
whatIsNotCovered: FOR JSON output format and chunking (F-4/F-6)
gapDescription.remedy: opt-in CI lane installing a pinned sqlcmd version, exercising the transport path
